title: Interrupted / Discontinued Case
desc: Your counselor paused (interrupted) or closed (discontinued) your case.

fields.name: reasonGiven
fields.label: Reason counselor gave for pause/closure
fields.placeholder: e.g. Claimed lack of contact or no progress

fields.name: hadNotice
fields.label: Did you receive a written warning notice prior to closure?

fields.name: isFiftyPercentOrMore
fields.label: Is your service-connected disability rating 50% or more?

fields.name: hadVaf200998
fields.label: Did you receive a formal written decision (VA Form 20-0998)?

errors: Closing or interrupting a case without sending a prior written notice of intent to discontinue.
Failing to perform a mandatory VR&E Officer (VREO) review of the proposed discontinuance for a veteran rated 50% or more disabling under 38 C.F.R. § 21.198(b)(7).
Failing to issue a formal written decision notice (VA Form 20-0998) explaining reasons and appeal rights.

evidenceChecklist.text: Copy of 30-day warning / intent to discontinue notice (or confirmation none was sent)
Sent emails, portal messages, or logs showing active attempts to contact VRC
Physician statement or evidence of medical emergency explaining missed appointments

bestNextActionRules.action: File administrative review requesting immediate VREO reversal of discontinuance under 38 C.F.R. § 21.197.
Request verification that the VR&E Officer (VREO) personally approved the discontinuance under 38 C.F.R. § 21.198(b)(7).

reviewLaneQuestions.question: Did you receive a written 30-day notice of intent to discontinue your program?
Is your combined service-connected disability rating 50% or higher?
Did you receive a formal written decision (VA Form 20-0998)?
